title: Portuguese Seafood Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew from Portugal, packed with succulent seafood and rich flavor.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté for 5 minutes, until softened.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the white wine and bring to a simmer. Scrape the bottom of the pot to release any browned bits.
Add the fish stock, tomato paste, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Add the cod fillets, shrimp, and mussels to the pot.
Bring the stew to a simmer and cook for 8-10 minutes, until the seafood is cooked through.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh parsley and lemon wedges.
Optional: Serve with crusty bread or over rice for a filling meal.
